meta.description: Machine-readable preview verification rules for background UI agents. These rules define when a generated preview is safe to show to PM/SA reviewers.

global_rules.name: Preview client must match request client
global_rules.verification: preview runtime booted with matching CLIENT env
global_rules.failure_message: Preview client does not match the page where the request originated.

global_rules.name: Preview route must match request route
global_rules.verification: preview URL path equals requested page path
global_rules.failure_message: Preview route does not match the selected page.

global_rules.name: Preview language must match request language
global_rules.verification: preview URL lng query, localStorage i18nextLng, or documentElement.lang matches request language
global_rules.failure_message: Preview language does not match the current page language.

global_rules.name: Screenshot must be captured after meaningful UI is visible
global_rules.verification: screenshot capture waits for text or interactive UI to appear
global_rules.failure_message: Preview screenshot was captured before the app finished rendering.

copy_update.verification: Changed i18n keys must belong to the namespace used by the selected component file.
copy_update.failure_message: A copy change targeted the wrong translation namespace.

copy_update.verification: At least one changed visible string must appear in the preview page text before review.
copy_update.failure_message: The requested copy change is not visible on the current route.

spacing_adjustment.verification: A preview screenshot must exist after the layout change.
spacing_adjustment.failure_message: A spacing change cannot be reviewed without a captured preview.

token_alignment.verification: design-system validate must pass after the token-related change.
token_alignment.failure_message: The requested token alignment failed design-system validation.
